patterns_discovered.pattern: Modular Architecture with Clear Separation of Concerns
patterns_discovered.description: Organization module follows strict layered architecture: Controller → Service → Repository → Database. Each layer has single responsibility.
benefits: Testability - each layer can be tested in isolation
Maintainability - changes isolated to specific layers
Reusability - service can be used by different controllers

patterns_discovered.description: Service implements before/after hooks for major operations (create, update, delete), allowing external code to extend functionality without modifying core logic.
Module emits domain events (OrganizationCreatedEvent, OrganizationUpdatedEvent, etc.) for state changes, enabling loose coupling between modules.
benefits: Audit trail and event sourcing capability

patterns_discovered.description: Uses TypeScript types alongside Zod schemas for compile-time and runtime validation, with type inference from schemas.
benefits: Single source of truth for structure definition

patterns_discovered.description: index.ts provides single import point for all module exports, organized by logical sections with clear comments.
benefits: Easy to see public API surface

patterns_discovered.description: Decorators enforce granular permissions (organization:read, organization:settings.update, etc.) at controller level.
Organizations support both ID and slug-based lookups, with uniqueness validation and generation utilities.
Organization settings is a complex nested object with 6 sub-categories (business, localization, features, notifications, branding, operating hours).
List operations support pagination (page, perPage) and filtering (status, search, etc.) through query parameters.
Organizations have explicit status values (ACTIVE, INACTIVE, SUSPENDED, etc.) with dedicated change operation.
Module defines feature availability by subscription tier (free, starter, professional, business, enterprise) in module.json.

gotchas_discovered.description: OrganizationSettings contains 6 sub-objects (BusinessSettings, LocalizationSettings, FeatureSettings, NotificationSettings, BrandingSettings, AddressInfo, OperatingHours). Partial updates to settings require careful merging logic.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: mergeSettings() utility function handles deep merging; validateSettings() ensures partial updates don't break structure

gotchas_discovered.description: Slugs must be unique and generated from organization names. Multiple organizations could have similar names requiring unique slug generation.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: generateUniqueSlug() utility and validateSlugUniqueness() service method

gotchas_discovered.description: Before/after hooks execute in sequence for create, update, delete operations. Hook failures could prevent persistence or leave inconsistent state.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Hook error handling in service layer; transaction wrapping recommended for database changes

gotchas_discovered.description: Module manages tenant organizations but doesn't appear to include tenant context enforcement in queries. Could allow data leakage if not properly filtered at repository level.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Repository methods should enforce tenant context filtering; middleware to set current tenant context

gotchas_discovered.description: Localization settings include timezone and language, but module doesn't show how these integrate with actual date handling or i18n system.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Detailed documentation needed; clear contracts between organization module and i18n/timezone libraries

gotchas_discovered.description: changeStatus() operation exists but validation rules for valid state transitions not visible in provided code (e.g., can SUSPENDED go directly to ACTIVE?).
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Status state machine needed; validation in changeStatus() service method

gotchas_discovered.description: 8 different organization permissions (read, create, update, delete, settings.read, settings.update, members.read, members.manage) creates complex RBAC matrix to manage.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Define role templates (Viewer, Editor, Admin); document permission matrix

gotchas_discovered.description: List operation uses offset-based pagination (page, perPage). Could be inefficient for large datasets or cause consistency issues with concurrent deletes.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Document pagination behavior; consider cursor-based pagination for large datasets

gotchas_discovered.description: Organization module depends on auth module, but auth module might depend on organization for user organization assignment.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Verify module dependency graph; use event-driven communication to break cycles

gotchas_discovered.description: Code shows delete() method but doesn't specify soft delete vs hard delete behavior, which is critical for data retention and compliance.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Implement soft delete by default; hard delete should be explicit admin operation; add deletedAt timestamp

approach_outcome.task: Create Organization module (CRUD, settings, tenant management)
approach_outcome.implementation_strategy: Layered modular architecture with separation of concerns
key_accomplishments: Comprehensive REST API endpoints for all CRUD operations
Complex nested settings management with type safety
Hook-based extension system for business logic customization
Role-based access control with granular permissions
Full TypeScript typing with Zod schema validation
Pagination and filtering for list operations
Module metadata with tiered feature support
technical_decisions: Used routing-controllers for decorator-based REST API
Chose Zod for runtime validation with TypeScript integration
Implemented service layer with hook system for extensibility
Modular export barrel file (index.ts) for clean API surface
approach_outcome.testing_coverage: Not visible in provided code - likely needs comprehensive test suite
approach_outcome.documentation: Excellent - comprehensive JSDoc comments, module.json metadata, example usage patterns
approach_outcome.code_quality: High - consistent patterns, clear separation of concerns, type safety throughout
scalability_considerations: Tiered feature gates allow SaaS scaling
Hook system allows custom business logic without core modifications
remaining_concerns: Tenant context isolation at repository level not explicitly shown
Status state machine validation not visible
Delete operation semantics unclear (soft vs hard delete)
Module dependency cycle risk with auth module

recommendations.recommendation: Implement tenant context filtering in repository queries to prevent data leakage across organizations
recommendations.implementation: Add tenantId parameter to all repository methods; enforce filtering at query level; add middleware for tenant context resolution

recommendations.recommendation: Define and implement delete strategy (soft delete with deletedAt timestamp recommended for compliance)
recommendations.implementation: Add deletedAt column to organizations table; filter deleted records from queries by default; explicit hard delete requires separate operation

recommendations.recommendation: Define valid status transitions and validate them in changeStatus() operation
recommendations.implementation: Create status transition matrix; validate in service layer; document allowed transitions

recommendations.recommendation: Create comprehensive test coverage for all layers (controller, service, repository)
recommendations.implementation: Unit tests for service logic; integration tests for API endpoints; permission tests for RBAC

recommendations.recommendation: Verify no circular dependencies exist between organization and auth modules
recommendations.implementation: Review auth module dependencies; break cycles with event-driven communication if needed

recommendations.recommendation: Document all error scenarios and HTTP status codes for each endpoint
recommendations.implementation: Create error response examples in API documentation; consistent error structure across endpoints

recommendations.recommendation: Document how timezone settings integrate with application date handling
recommendations.implementation: Create timezone utility functions; document conversion patterns; test across timezones

recommendations.recommendation: Define and document business rules for each settings category
recommendations.implementation: Add constraints to Zod schemas; validate operating hours don't overlap; validate color hex format

recommendations.recommendation: Document pagination behavior and consider cursor-based pagination for large datasets
recommendations.implementation: Document offset-based limitations; add cursor-based pagination as optional optimization

recommendations.recommendation: Define pre-built role templates (Viewer, Editor, Admin) to simplify permission management
recommendations.implementation: Create permission matrix documentation; provide role templates in module configuration

recommendations.recommendation: Implement audit trail for organization changes and access
recommendations.implementation: Log all mutations; track permission checks; integrate with event system

recommendations.recommendation: Generate OpenAPI/Swagger documentation from code annotations
recommendations.implementation: Use TypeDoc/Swagger decorators; auto-generate API reference; include examples
